assessment.note: The answer 'nothing' provides no signal on clarity or engagement.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Team dynamics insight
new_queue.name: How do you feel about the current team dynamics and your place within the team?
new_queue.description: Explores James's perception of team connection and potential relational issues.

new_queue.label: Motivation drivers
new_queue.name: What aspects of your role are currently the most motivating for you?
new_queue.description: Identifies what keeps James engaged and invested in his role.

new_queue.label: Support needs
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the biggest difference in your work right now?
new_queue.description: Investigates how the manager can better support James's work and priorities.

new_queue.label: Energy fluctuations
new_queue.name: What's been impacting your energy levels the most these past weeks?
new_queue.description: Identifies factors affecting James's energy, beyond surface-level check-ins.

new_queue.label: Future growth
new_queue.name: What skills or experiences are you looking to develop next?
new_queue.description: Explores James's personal growth ambitions and future learning goals.

new_queue.label: Priority alignment
new_queue.name: Do you feel your current priorities align with the team's goals?
new_queue.description: Checks if James sees his work as aligned with the broader team vision.

new_queue.label: Role clarity
new_queue.name: Where do you currently feel unclear about what's expected of you?
new_queue.description: Surfaces areas where James might lack clarity in his role or tasks.

new_queue.label: Work-life balance
new_queue.name: How are you managing your work-life balance recently?
new_queue.description: Assesses James's ability to maintain a sustainable balance between work and personal life.
